2298680.name: GameGuru MAX - Easter Kit
2298680.description:
A Special Easter DLC pack of Easter-themed media to use in your GameGuru MAX productions!

This DLC is packed with over 90 Easter Entities:

1 Todd Rabbit (player)
1 Rabbit Princess
5 Rocks
10 Trolls
5 Volcanic rocks
1 Volcanic tree
2 Fences
1 Wooden Hut
5 Angry Egg Enemies
5 Collectable Eggs
3 Trees
8 Flowers
3 Poison flowers
2 Portal parts
3 Windmill parts
2 Mushrooms
1 Pillar
14 Platform sections
1 Hedge
1 Barrel
2 Bridge sections
1 Bucket
1 Crate
1 Butterfly
1 Castle
1 Castle gate
1 Hot Lava square
1 Invisible wall

The pack will effortlessly install direct into your GameGuru MAX asset library! Check it out and start exploring your new library resource of game assets.

All the assets in this pack are royalty free, meaning any game you make with them can be legally sold by you.
2298680.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
